SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

Class MetadataBuilder

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.MetadataBuilder
public class MetadataBuilder extends Object
This class implements the builder pattern to create Metadata for processing an ADS Request. It handles all the business rules for validating content before building the Metadata object.

  • Field Summary

    Field

    static final String
    FACILITY_IZG

  • Method Details

    • build

      public MetadataImpl build() throws MetadataFault
      Return the built metadata object.
      Returns:
      the built metadata object.
      Throws:
      MetadataFault - if any errors were founding during the building process.

    • hasErrors

      public boolean hasErrors()
      Returns true if there were any errors while building.
      Returns:
      true if there were any errors while building

    • getErrors

      public List<String> getErrors()
      Get the list of errors found in the metadata.
      Returns:
      the list of errors found in the metadata

    • setReportType

      public MetadataBuilder setReportType(String reportType)
      Set the report type
      Parameters:
      reportType - the report type
      Returns:
      The metadata builder.

    • setPeriod

      public MetadataBuilder setPeriod(String period)
      Set the period associated with the report
      Parameters:
      period - the period associated with the report, in the form YYYY-MMM or YYYYQ[1-4]
      Returns:
      The metadata builder

    • setFilename

      public MetadataBuilder setFilename(String filename)
      Set the filename of the report The filename structure is well defined for each report type and is used to valid metadata parameters.
      Parameters:
      filename - The filename.
      Returns:
      The MetadataBuilder

    • setMessageId

      public MetadataBuilder setMessageId(String messageId)
      Set messageId from passed in messageId value. If it is already a UUID, use it, otherwise hash the string
      Parameters:
      messageId - The messageId
      Returns:
      The metadata builder.

    • setRouteId

      public MetadataBuilder setRouteId(gov.cdc.izgateway.service.IDestinationService dests, String routeId)
      Set the route identifier
      Parameters:
      dests - A reference to the destination service to validate routes
      routeId - The route
      Returns:
      The MetadataBuilder

    • setProvenance

      public MetadataBuilder setProvenance(String facilityId, gov.cdc.izgateway.logging.event.TransactionData transactionData)
      Set the provenance of the report
      Parameters:
      facilityId - The facility identifier
      transactionData - The source of user metadata (it has the certificate name), and IP address
      Returns:
      The MetadataBuilder

      Set the intended destination for the report.

      Returns:
